mapper.insert: insert into im_conversation(conversation_id, user_a, user_b, last_seq) values (#{conversationId}, #{userA, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userB, jdbcType=BINARY}, 0)
mapper.select: select last_seq from im_conversation where conversation_id = #{conversationId} for update
mapper.update: update im_conversation set last_seq = #{lastSeq}, updated_at = current_timestamp where conversation_id = #{conversationId}
